hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd "$(dirname $FILE)" && npx prettier --write "$FILE" --log-level silent 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if [ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_EXIT_CODE" != "0" ]; then echo "[กู๊ดดี้] ⚠️ Command failed — หา root cause ก่อน retry"; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "กู๊ดดี้ needs input 👋" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'display notification "Task complete! ✅" with title "กู๊ดดี้" sound name "Hero"' 2>/dev/null && bash $HOME/.claude/scripts/auto-learn.sh
